summary: One residual SSRF bypass remains in url-fetcher; the jobs SSE authz, PDF render origin, and CDN host allowlist fixes are otherwise closed in the inspected files.

findings.invariant: "url-fetcher now blocks IPv4-mapped private IPv6 via isBlockedIpv4Octets + '::'"
findings.title: IPv4-mapped private IPv6 in hex form can bypass the resolved-IP SSRF guard
findings.recommendation: Replace the dotted-only ::ffff regex with robust IP parsing/normalization that detects IPv4-mapped IPv6 in both dotted and hex forms, strips brackets before classification, and applies the private IPv4 blocklist to the mapped address before fetch.
